lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੀਆ ਦਰਦ ਘਣੇ ਵੇਦਨ ਜਾਣੇ ਤੂ ਧਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: dukheea darad ghane vedan jaane too dhanee |
lines.english: The miserable endure so much suffering and pain; You alone know their pain, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਣਾ ਲਖ ਭਵੇ ਪਿਰੀ ਡਿਖੰਦੋ ਤਾ ਜੀਵਸਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jaanaa lakh bhave piree ddikhando taa jeevasaa |2|
lines.english: I may know hundreds of thousands of remedies, but I shall live only if I see my Husband Lord. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਈ ਰਹੇ ਅਮਾਣ ਜਿਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: seee rahe amaan jinaa satigur bhettiaa |3|
lines.english: They alone remain intact, who meet with the True Guru. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਢਹਦੀ ਜਾਇ ਕਰਾਰਿ ਵਹਣਿ ਵਹੰਦੇ ਮੈ ਡਿਠਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dtahadee jaae karaar vehan vahande mai dditthiaa |
lines.english: I have seen the river-bank washed away by the raging waters of the river.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਨਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੁਝਿਆ ਸੁ ਚਹੁ ਕੁੰਡੀ ਜਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: jin jan guramukh bujhiaa su chahu kunddee jaapai |
lines.english: That humble Gurmukh who understands, is celebrated in the four directions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਤੇਰੀ ਭੁਖ ਹੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਵਿਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis jan teree bhukh hai tis dukh na viaapai |
lines.english: No pain afflicts that humble being who hungers for You, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੀ ਮਲੁ ਉਤਰੈ ਗੁਰ ਧੂੜੀ ਨਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam kee mal utarai gur dhoorree naapai |
lines.english: The filth of countless incarnations is washed away, bathing in the dust of the Guru's feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਨਰੁ ਉਸ ਕੀ ਸਰਣੀ ਪਰੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਕੰਬਹਿ ਪਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: jo nar us kee saranee parai tis kanbeh paapai |
lines.english: Sins run away from that man, who seeks the Sanctuary of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਤੂ ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਮਿਤੁ ਹੈ ਸਭਿ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo too sabhanaa kaa mit hai sabh jaaneh aapai |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, You are the friend of all; all believe that You are theirs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਣਾ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਸੋਗੁ ਨ ਸੰਤਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: jin har bhaanaa maniaa tis sog na santaapai |
lines.english: Whoever submits to the Lord's Will does not suffer in sorrow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਜਨੈ ਕੀ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਹਰਿ ਪਰਤਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: aisee sobhaa janai kee jevadd har parataapai |
lines.english: The glory of the Lord's humble servant is as great as the Glorious Radiance of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜਨ ਵਰਤਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਤੇ ਜਾਪੈ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: sabh antar jan varataaeaa har jan te jaapai |8|
lines.english: Among all, His humble servant is pre-eminent; through His humble servant, the Lord is known. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਪਿਛੈ ਹਉ ਗਈ ਸੇ ਮੈ ਪਿਛੈ ਭੀ ਰਵਿਆਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa pichhai hau gee se mai pichhai bhee raviaas |
lines.english: Those whom I followed, now follow me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਕੀ ਮੈ ਆਸੜੀ ਤਿਨਾ ਮਹਿਜੀ ਆਸ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jinaa kee mai aasarree tinaa mahijee aas |1|
lines.english: Those in whom I placed my hopes, now place their hopes in me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਲੀ ਗਿਲੀ ਰੋਡੜੀ ਭਉਦੀ ਭਵਿ ਭਵਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: gilee gilee roddarree bhaudee bhav bhav aae |
lines.english: The fly flies around, and comes to the wet lump of molasses.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਬੈਠੇ ਸੇ ਫਾਥਿਆ ਉਬਰੇ ਭਾਗ ਮਥਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jo baitthe se faathiaa ubare bhaag mathaae |2|
lines.english: Whoever sits on it, is caught; they alone are saved, who have good destiny on their foreheads. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਿਠਾ ਹਭ ਮਝਾਹਿ ਖਾਲੀ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਜਾਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: dditthaa habh majhaeh khaalee koe na jaaneeai |
lines.english: I see Him within all. No one is without Him.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੈ ਸਖੀ ਭਾਗ ਮਥਾਹਿ ਜਿਨੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਜਣੁ ਰਾਵਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tai sakhee bhaag mathaeh jinee meraa sajan raaviaa |3|
lines.english: Good destiny is inscribed on the forehead of that companion, who who enjoys the Lord, my Friend. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਢਾਢੀ ਦਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਦਾ ਜੇ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: hau dtaadtee dar gun gaavadaa je har prabh bhaavai |
lines.english: I am a minstrel at His Door, singing His Glorious Praises, to please to my Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਥਿਰ ਥਾਵਰੀ ਹੋਰ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh meraa thir thaavaree hor aavai jaavai |
lines.english: My God is permanent and stable; others continue coming and going.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਮੰਗਾ ਦਾਨੁ ਗੋੁਸਾਈਆ ਜਿਤੁ ਭੁਖ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: so mangaa daan gousaaeea jit bhukh leh jaavai |
lines.english: I beg for that gift from the Lord of the World, which will satisfy my hunger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੀਉ ਦੇਵਹੁ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਢਾਢੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh jeeo devahu darasan aapanaa jit dtaadtee tripataavai |
lines.english: O Dear Lord God, please bless Your minstrel with the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan, that I might be satisfied and fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਸੁਣੀ ਦਾਤਾਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਢਾਢੀ ਕਉ ਮਹਲਿ ਬੁਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: aradaas sunee daataar prabh dtaadtee kau mehal bulaavai |
lines.english: God, the Great Giver, hears the prayer, and summons the minstrel to the Mansion of His Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦੇਖਦਿਆ ਦੁਖ ਭੁਖ ਗਈ ਢਾਢੀ ਕਉ ਮੰਗਣੁ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh dekhadiaa dukh bhukh gee dtaadtee kau mangan chit na aavai |
lines.english: Gazing upon God, the minstrel is rid of pain and hunger; he does not think to ask for anything else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਨਿਰਗੁਣੁ ਢਾਢੀ ਬਖਸਿਓਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਪੁਰਖਿ ਵੇਦਾਵੈ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: hau niragun dtaadtee bakhasion prabh purakh vedaavai |9|
lines.english: I am His humble, unworthy minstrel; the Primal Lord God has forgiven me. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਇਛਾ ਪੂਰੀਆ ਲਗਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe ichhaa pooreea lag prabh kai paavai |
lines.english: All desires are fulfilled, touching the feet of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਜਨ ਸੇਤੀ ਨੇਹੁ ਤੂ ਕੈ ਗੁਣਿ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਾਣਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: durajan setee nehu too kai gun har rang maanahee |1|
lines.english: You are in love with evil people; by what virtues will you enjoy the Lord's Love? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਛੁਟੇ ਤਾ ਖਾਕੁ ਤੂ ਸੁੰਞੀ ਕੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaa chhutte taa khaak too sunyee kant na jaanahee |
lines.english: When the soul leaves, you shall become dust, O vacant body; why do you not realize your Husband Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਘੜੀ ਨ ਜੀਵਣਾ ਵਿਸਰੇ ਸਰੈ ਨ ਬਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: naanak jis bin gharree na jeevanaa visare sarai na bind |
lines.english: O Nanak, without Him, you cannot survive, even for an instant; you cannot afford to forget Him, even for a moment.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਕਿਉ ਮਨ ਰੂਸੀਐ ਜਿਸਹਿ ਹਮਾਰੀ ਚਿੰਦ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tis siau kiau man rooseeai jiseh hamaaree chind |2|
lines.english: Why are you alienated from Him, O my mind? He takes care of you. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤੇ ਰੰਗਿ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਕੈ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਅਤਿ ਗੁਲਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: rate rang paarabraham kai man tan at gulaal |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Love of the Supreme Lord God, their minds and bodies are colored deep crimson.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਵੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: pavarree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਆਲੂਦਿਆ ਜਿਤੀ ਹੋਰੁ ਖਿਆਲੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak vin naavai aaloodiaa jitee hor khiaal |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the Name, other thoughts are polluted and corrupt. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਜਾ ਤੂ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਿਤ੍ਰੁ ਹੈ ਤਾ ਕਿਆ ਮੈ ਕਾੜਾ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo jaa too meraa mitru hai taa kiaa mai kaarraa |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, when You are my friend, what sorrow can afflict me?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਲੰਘਾਇਆ ਜਿਤਾ ਪਾਵਾੜਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur bhaujal paar langhaaeaa jitaa paavaarraa |
lines.english: The Guru has carried me across the terrifying world-ocean, and I have won the battle.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਠਗੀ ਜਗੁ ਠਗਿਆ ਸੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਮਾਰਿ ਨਿਵਾੜਾ ॥
lines.translit: jinee tthagee jag tthagiaa se tudh maar nivaarraa |
lines.english: You have beaten off and destroyed the cheats that cheat the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸਭਿ ਰਸ ਭੋਗਦਾ ਵਡਾ ਆਖਾੜਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee sabh ras bhogadaa vaddaa aakhaarraa |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, I enjoy all the pleasures in the great world-arena.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਇੰਦ੍ਰੀਆ ਵਸਿ ਕਰਿ ਦਿਤੀਓ ਸਤਵੰਤਾ ਸਾੜਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh indreea vas kar diteeo satavantaa saarraa |
lines.english: The True Lord has brought all my senses and organs under my control.
